## 2025-02-27 - [Secure Referral Code Generation]
**Vulnerability:** Weak pseudo-random number generator (Math.random()) used for generating referral codes.
**Learning:** Math.random() is predictable and cryptographically insecure, leaving identifiers generated by it susceptible to collisions and brute-forcing. A defense-in-depth approach dictates generating tokens using secure primitives, even if the application's overall risk profile varies.
**Prevention:** Always use crypto.getRandomValues() or crypto.randomUUID() for generation of unique identifiers, tokens, referral codes, or any sensitive random-values in Next.js or front-end applications to guarantee cryptographic security.
